description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single release job that runs in the release stage using the docker:stable image and the docker:stable-dind service. The job logs in to the GitLab Container Registry using docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" "$CI_REGISTRY" in before_script. It only runs on the master branch or when a tag is pushed. In the script it checks if CI_COMMIT_TAG is set; if so it sets BUILD_IMAGE_NAME to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest and RELEASE_IMAGE_NAME to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG, then executes ./build/src/release.sh. The job is tagged with docker.
